---
title: "Tier 5 — Undergraduate Core"
subtitle: "Years 1–2 · planned, not yet built"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This tier is **planned but not yet authored.** See [`_curriculum.yml`](/_curriculum.yml)
for the topic plan and the [Home page](/index.qmd) for build status.
:::

## Planned scope

Linear algebra · multivariable and vector calculus · discrete mathematics
and logic · probability and statistics · introductory number theory · real
analysis (proof-based).

[← Back to Home](/index.qmd)
